steps.desc: Create configs/panels.json with 6 panel biome definitions
Update terrain.json to remove hardcoded dimensions, add panel_count tiers
Add Frontier Expansion I-V diamond nodes to upgrades.json
Create src/game/panel-grid.ts — PanelGrid class computing panel dimensions from viewport, tracking unlock state, resolving world coords to panel IDs
Create TerrainType.ThornWall in terrain-grid.ts — impassable thorn vine terrain for locked panels
Rewrite vertical-map.ts to generate terrain per-panel using PanelGrid + panels.json biome rules. Thorn wall fill for locked panels.
Rewrite spawn-vertical.ts to place Lodge in panel 5 center-bottom, resources per panel biome, enemies at top-row panel edges
Wire panel-grid into game-init.ts — compute panels from viewport, generate terrain, spawn entities
Rewrite camera.ts zoom: base zoom = panel 5 fills screen. Pinch-zoom out to see all unlocked panels. Clamp to unlocked bounds.
Rewrite camera.ts pan: drag within unlocked panels only. Cannot pan into thorn walls.
Add pinch-zoom gesture to pointer.ts for mobile

phases.name: Cut — Remove Minimap, Airdrops, Ability Bar

steps.desc: Remove minimap canvas + refs from app.tsx. Make onMount work without minimapCanvasRef/minimapCamRef.
Remove AirdropButton from app.tsx. Remove airdrop signals/imports. Remove useAirdrop from abilities.ts if no other consumer.
Remove AbilityBar from app.tsx. Remove ability signals. Keep commander ability logic for future prestige integration.
Remove minimap-panel.tsx, minimap-renderer.ts, pointer-minimap.ts if no consumers remain.

phases.name: Rendering — Thorn Walls + Panel Biome Visuals

steps.desc: Add thorn wall tile rendering in background.ts — dark murky green with vine silhouettes matching design bible aesthetic
Distinct biome visuals per panel: grassland(5), muddy forest(2), rocky marsh(1), flooded swamp(3), stone quarry(4), dense thicket(6)
Mount SVG animated sprites (SpriteOtter/Croc/Snake) on main menu as animated showcase
Unit tests: panel-grid computation at 375x667, 960x540, 1920x1080 viewports
Unit tests: panel unlock progression all 6 stages, thorn wall impassability, entity spawning per biome
Unit tests: camera zoom bounds per stage, pan clamping to unlocked area
E2E: tap PLAY → panel 5 → Lodge at bottom → units visible → zoom out shows thorns
Full verification: typecheck + tests + lint + build + screenshot

agents.engine-agent: Core game engine (panel-grid, terrain gen, spawning, game-init)
agents.cleanup-agent: Remove deprecated UI (minimap, airdrops, ability bar)
agents.render-agent: Thorn wall visuals, biome rendering, SVG sprites on menu
